HEIRLOOM_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a Colorless card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add a copy of that card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. {IfUpgraded:show:It's free to play this turn.|}
SPECTRUM_SHIFT.description: At the start of your turn, add {Cards:diff()} random {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded|} Colorless {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ROYALTIES.description: At the end of combat, {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold]. {IfUpgraded:show:Gain an additional 3 [gold]Gold[/gold] every time you play a Colorless card.|}
_CRASH_LANDING.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. {IfUpgraded:show:Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL your cards containing [gold]Debris[/gold].|}
Fill your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Debris[/gold].
FOREGONE_CONCLUSION.description: Next turn, put {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. {IfUpgraded:show:They cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less to play this turn.|}
